mapper.select:
select s.*,c.name as Category_name from setmeal s join category c on s.category_id = c.id
and s.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
and s.category_id like concat('%',#{categoryId},'%')
and s.status like concat('%',#{status},'%')
order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into setmeal (name, category_id, price, image, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{image}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update:
update setmeal
category_id =#{categoryId},
name =#{name},
price =#{price},
status =#{status},
description =#{description},
image =#{image},
create_time =#{createTime},
update_time =#{updateTime},
create_user =#{createUser},
update_user =#{updateUser}
id = #{id}
